title: From Yeşil to Irgandı
description: Spend a themed day in Bursa: visit the Yeşil Tomb, Yeşil Mosque, Irgandı Bridge, and Yeşilçam Cafe.
notes: Stand in awe of the turquoise tiled tomb.
Experience the refined elegance of early Ottoman architecture.
Walk across the artist studio-lined stone bridge.
Take a break with a view of the tomb.
There's free public restroom near the square.
